name: Neshkoro Parks & Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Neshkoro Parks & Recreation in Neshkoro, WI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Westfield Thomas Street
description: Westfield Thomas Street is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, WI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.
